ALLOWLIST_RULE_TOO_BROAD: A manifest allow rule can cover current output too broadly.
CURRENT_SURFACE_REJECTED_LEGACY_ACTIVE_S: Legacy active/silent appeared as a current generated/operator, writer, or packaged Lua label.
DEFAULT_RESOLVER_REJECTED_LEGACY_COMPAT_: Existing resolver guard owns legacy compatibility compose_profile fallback rejection.
DEFAULT_RUNTIME_STATE_REJECTED_LEGACY_EN: Existing runtime_state guard owns default-path active/silent runtime enum rejection.
DIAGNOSTIC_ALIAS_USED_OUTSIDE_EXPLICIT_D: A diagnostic/import alias occurrence appeared outside an explicit diagnostic/import surface.
LEGACY_METRIC_KEY_RENDERED_AS_CURRENT_LA: A legacy metric key was rendered as a current label.
UNALLOWLISTED_LEGACY_ACTIVE_SILENT_OCCUR: Legacy active/silent occurrence did not match a hard-fail or allow rule.
